taskTemplate.name: HOI Review
taskTemplate.description: Review homeowners insurance policy for coverage adequacy and lender requirements

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Coverage Amounts
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Coverage Amounts – Confirm dwelling coverage meets or exceeds the loan amount and that liability and other required coverage amounts are sufficient

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Lender Named as Mortgagee
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Lender Named as Mortgagee – Confirm the lender is listed as the mortgagee on the policy; if not, request an updated declarations page from the insurance agent
subTaskTemplate.type: HOI Review – Verify Lender Named as Mortgagee

subTaskTemplate.name: Confirm Policy Effective Date
subTaskTemplate.description: Confirm Policy Effective Date – Verify the policy effective date is on or before the loan closing date
subTaskTemplate.type: HOI Review – Confirm Policy Effective Date

subTaskTemplate.name: Review Deductibles
subTaskTemplate.description: Review Deductibles – Review deductible amounts to ensure they meet lender guidelines; flag any deductible exceeding the allowable threshold
